'''Ord Sigatt''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The planet was originally settled by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] militia as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]], but upon the discovery of [[carvanium]] by one of the settlers, it quickly evolved into a mining colony.<ref name="Obi-Wan" />

The main settlement on Ord Sigatt consisted of a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], an energy station, and a [[Water/Legends|water]] treatment facility, among which many of the colonists settled.<ref name="Obi-Wan" />

[[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]] once owned a rough-and-tumble bar on this planet, though the bar was mainly a front for an illegal [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-running racket. It was on this world where Jettster first met [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. He was there because he and his [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]], [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]], were investigating the disappearance of the ''[[Hardy Harrow]]'', a carvanium-mining ship. They later found out that Dexter Jettster and his friends were behind the disappearance, to protest the tyrannical rule of [[Denon-Ardru Mutual]].<ref name="Obi-Wan" />

{{Planet-stub}}
